---
title: "Complex Systems"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*.ipynb"
    - "!index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

## Complex Systems

Explorations of emergence, self-organization, networks, and the dynamics of interconnected systems.

### Topics to explore:

- Pattern formation and self-organization
- Network theory and graph dynamics
- Bifurcations and critical transitions
- Agent-based modeling
- Chaos and nonlinear dynamics
- Scale-free phenomena and power laws
- Resilience and tipping points

---

::: {#listing}
:::
